summary: Started Phase 0 + Phase 1 implementation (issues #21-#24) from approved plan .pipeline/plans/speaker-attribution-voiceprint/plan.md.

Implemented Soniox async STT adapter with token-to-segment diarization folding (stt.v1 additive speaker field + golden fixture + adapter manifest), Transcription.speaker_cluster/speaker_auto with online migration script, cluster-aware deferred pipeline (DOM vote naming, no cluster overwrite), PATCH /meetings/{id}/transcripts/speakers (rename/merge/reassign, Redis invalidation after commit, Drive requeue with in-place file update, replace-mode correction re-application), and dashboard inline speaker editing (rename/merge/range reassign). Tests: transcription-service 11, meeting-api 297+67, dashboard 73; builds green; adapter gate pass; preflight warn (schema path, expected).

Codex sidechain review returned 2 blockers + 3 majors + 1 minor; all fixed: post-meeting-only status gate on the speaker PATCH, merge-alias durability for replace, Drive rerun_requested mid-export race handling with pre-done refresh, SELECT FOR UPDATE on meeting row, schema-sync online_only index skip, dashboard stale-filter clear. Regression tests added; meeting-api 375 passed, dashboard 73 passed + build, findings recorded in HD ledger.
